steps.prompt: Extract data from {data_source}. Identify the data format and schema, handle encoding and delimiter issues, log any malformed records, and produce a clean extracted dataset. Document the extraction metadata: record count, schema detected, any records skipped, and data quality observations.

Transform the extracted data from extracted-data.md for loading into {destination}. Apply format conversion to {format}, normalize fields, handle null values, deduplicate records, and apply any business rules. Log all transformations applied and any records that could not be transformed.

Validate the transformed data in transformed-data.md before loading into {destination}. Check: schema conformity, referential integrity, business rule compliance, statistical outliers, completeness metrics, and compare record counts against the extraction phase. Produce a validation report with pass/fail status and details for any failures.

checkpoint_config.message: Review validation-report.md. Confirm data quality is acceptable before loading into the destination. Approve to proceed with the load step.

steps.prompt: Load the validated data from transformed-data.md into {destination}. Execute the load operation, verify record counts match expectations from validation-report.md, confirm data accessibility in the destination, and document the load results including any warnings or partial failures.
